current.title: State Capacity AI
current.blurb: AI is making consequential decisions with no standard for disclosure — so this builds the missing language for authority, transparency, and contest.

current.title: Occupant — AI Compute Benchmarks
current.blurb: A public, daily-updated price index for AI compute, tracking 2,300+ models so nobody has to budget on vibes.

current.title: HeyPBJ
current.blurb: Dating and social discovery reframed as a routing problem — cohorts and guided prompts instead of endless feeds.

current.title: Glowrm
current.blurb: Trust infrastructure for AT Protocol apps, letting reputation, identity, and consent travel across networks.

current.title: Leafroll
current.blurb: Dynamic, modular professional profiles that travel across networks instead of living inside one platform.

current.title: Portland Digital Corps
current.blurb: After 18F closed, a test of whether community-driven service delivery actually works without the federal badge.

current.title: Design For The Public 24
current.blurb: A two-day unconference bringing together 80+ civic technologists and designers.

current.title: Oregon HS Tennis Tournament Format
current.blurb: Five years of systems thinking and institutional change, moving Oregon high school tennis to a unified team dual-match format.

current.title: Parachute Commons License
current.blurb: A modular open-licensing framework that makes sustainability tradeoffs explicit — built to be read, forked, and adapted.

current.title: Oregon HS Tennis Rankings System
current.blurb: A data-driven ranking and playoff-simulation system for evaluating and seeding Oregon high school tennis teams.

current.title: AI Economic Activity Index
current.blurb: A real-time global index of AI compute activity — token volumes, spend, and energy — modeled on how the IMF tracks reserves.

current.title: Teaching Public Mechanics — University of Michigan
current.blurb: Design education that teaches people to understand infrastructure and repair what's broken, not just ship more apps.

current.title: AT Protocol Projects
current.blurb: An interconnected suite of decentralized data infrastructure and public-goods experiments.

current.title: Consequence Design
current.blurb: A framework for surfacing the downstream effects of design decisions before they ship.

past.title: 18F — Eight Years Inside the Machine
past.blurb: Millions served and billions saved — how design impact can scale beyond the tech.

past.title: Service Delivery at Scale
past.blurb: Design leadership across federal programs serving millions, at the intersection of policy intent and delivery reality.

past.title: 18F Website Redesign
past.blurb: A content-first refresh clarifying 18F's capacity-building role.

past.title: eAPD (Electronic Advanced Planning Document)
past.blurb: A federal web application modernizing how states submit Medicaid funding requests.

past.title: Benefits Determination & Appeals System
past.blurb: A full-stack prototype modeling government benefits review and appeals processes.

past.title: AI Decision Transparency Dashboard
past.blurb: A prototype exploring how automated benefits decisions can be reviewed and challenged.

past.title: TACLOG — Field Delivery Supply App
past.blurb: A mobile-first supply requisition prototype for offline field logistics.

past.title: Nautilus Staffing Prototype
past.blurb: A staffing decision tool consolidating crew management and role requirements.

past.title: City of Bloomington Website Redesign
past.blurb: A full-site redesign reorganizing municipal content around resident tasks, not departments.

past.title: Beyond Civic Tech: Public Mechanics Starts at Home
past.blurb: A conference talk on the invisible maintenance and repair work that keeps public services running after launch day.
